rationale: Acting on Review 2 yields the minimal PR exactly matching the module docstring's stated API (only the two Layer-0 facts, with appropriate @[simp]); Review 1's demanded aut_apply_root lemma and simp relocation are unlisted internal details of a later (Z/2)^n step and add needless surface for api-design. The rcases and attribute are visible in the diff but not material issues a maintainer would require fixing.
